data_flow_pipeline.entry_point: User runs bat command -> main() in src/bin/bat/main.rs parses command-line arguments via clap and initializes the application

stages.responsibility: Parse command-line arguments, load configuration files, build Config struct
stages.input: Command-line arguments, environment variables, config files
stages.output: Config struct containing syntax mapping, theme, paging mode, wrapping, line ranges, and style components

stages.responsibility: Load syntax definitions, themes, and language mappings
stages.input: Config struct specifying theme and syntax preferences

stages.responsibility: Open and prepare input sources, handle binary detection, encoding detection
stages.input: File paths or stdin from Config
stages.output: OpenedInput with InputReader, InputDescription, and InputMetadata

stages.responsibility: Apply syntax highlighting, apply style components, generate line decorations
stages.input: Raw file content, syntax rules, theme colors, style components
stages.output: Highlighted lines with ANSI escape sequences, decorations, and formatting

stages.responsibility: Manage output destination, handle line range filtering, pagination, and terminal output
stages.input: Highlighted content, Config paging mode, line ranges
stages.output: Formatted text written to terminal via stdout or pager process

data_flow_pipeline.exit_point: Terminal displays colored, formatted source code with syntax highlighting, line numbers, git diff markers, and optional paging

clap_app.rs.role: Defines command-line argument schema using clap

config.rs.role: Defines Config struct holding all user preferences

vscreen.rs.role: ANSI escape sequence parsing and management

theme.rs.role: Theme selection and color scheme detection

syntax_mapping.rs.role: Maps file extensions/names to syntax definitions

cross_module_interactions.interaction: main() calls App::config() to construct Config

cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Config, HighlightingAssets, Input list -> printed output

cross_module_interactions.interaction: App::config() populates Config fields from ArgMatches

cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Line number, raw content -> formatted ANSI output

cross_module_interactions.interaction: InteractivePrinter uses ANSI escape sequence parsing

cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Line number, git changes, config -> decoration strings
File path -> HashMap of line changes

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Asset loading uses theme selection logic

extension_proposal.feature: Custom filter/transform stage for piping highlighted output through external commands
required_changes: Extend output.rs for piping to external processes
Extend config.rs with filter command field
Ensure vscreen.rs preserves escape sequences through filter
integration_points: controller.rs checks for filter mode before creating OutputType
output.rs reuses pager pattern for filter process
printer.rs output flows through filter process
